rule_metadata.name: android_spywaller
rule_metadata.description: Rule for detection of Android Spywaller samples

rules.rule_text:
import "androguard"

rule android_spywaller : android
{
	meta:
		description = "Rule for detection of Android Spywaller samples"
		sample = "7b31656b9722f288339cb2416557241cfdf69298a749e49f07f912aeb1e5931b"
		source = "http://blog.fortinet.com/post/android-spywaller-firewall-style-antivirus-blocking"

	strings:
		$str_1 = "droid.png"
		$str_2 = "getSrvAddr"
		$str_3 = "getSrvPort"
		$str_4 = "android.intent.action.START_GOOGLE_SERVICE"

	condition:
		androguard.certificate.sha1( "165F84B05BD33DA1BA0A8E027CEF6026B7005978" ) or androguard.permission ( /android.permission.INTERNET/ ) and androguard.permission ( /android.permission.READ_PHONE_STATE/ ) and all of ( $str_* )
}
